title: 5+1 Constitution (K2-ruled 2026-05-30)
publicClaimBoundary: Five refusals (eta=0, K2, K3, K4, A7) + Omega as the directional +1. Omega is NOT a sixth refusal; on a categorically different axis. The eta=0 fence reads from two centres (additive 0 = zero extraction, multiplicative 1 = preservation of reciprocal relation).

title: The Logarithmic Realignment (formal system)
publicClaimBoundary: All mathematics is [A] standard. The framework reading (additive line is right for ADDITION, log line is right for MULTIPLICATION) is [S] framework structure. The 'log line as the truer model' reading is [I] interpretive.
nextAction: The log realignment carries the framework's name 'Zero-Sum Resolution Equation' as a literal coordinate-identity statement: log phi + log nu = 0.

title: The Five Forces of Emergence (geometric re-expression, [C]-tier proposal)
publicClaimBoundary: Geometric re-expression where each D-level is identified with a specific geometric object (point on log line -> log line -> Riemann sphere -> Bloch sphere -> horn torus -> Burrisphere -> CCC Return / closed loop). F1-F5 mapped to D1-D5 is a framework reading [C/I], NOT a Standard Model replacement. Convergent at D0, D1, D4, D5, D6; divergent in emphasis at D2 (time vs topology) and D3 (form vs state space).
nextAction: Pending theorem-upgrade audit per 03_FORMAL_SYSTEM/32_THEOREM_UPGRADE_PROTOCOL.md. Where convergent, the geometric language may be adopted as supplementary. Where divergent, it is an open question for L3 audit.
